summary: XCE's public steering pattern transfers to mcp-coco-index as a gated advisor first-action hint plus bounded pre-embedding query expansion, not as unconditional global steering or closed-source PRAT internals.

label: Advisor firing should adapt XCE use-first steering into gated mcp-coco-index first-action hint
Query expansion slots before query embedding and can reuse existing dedup/rank merger
Existing path_class taxonomy can provide bounded intent priors for expanded sub-query weighting
Closed-source XCE intent routing internals are not adoptable from public docs
Expansion needs hard fanout cap and exact-intent suppression to protect precision
